name: Civil Engineering
description: Civil engineering brings systems thinking and infrastructure resilience expertise to ensuring AI-dependent critical systems remain safe and robust.

people.name: Sanjib Sharma
people.description: Integrates AI and big data to improve predictions of lead contamination in drinking water and enhance flood resilience.

people.name: Ali Behnood
people.description: Focuses on the next generation of sustainable and resilient infrastructure by optimizing recycled material use with AI.

people.name: Liuyun Xu
people.description: Introduced a 'multi-fidelity' simulation framework to rapidly predict building responses to rare and severe natural hazards.

trajectory: Infrastructure safety standards and failure mode analysis directly apply to assessing critical AI system reliability.
Structural resilience thinking helps design AI systems and AI-dependent infrastructure that degrade gracefully.
Environmental engineering expertise informs safe deployment of AI in water, energy, and transportation systems.
Multi-fidelity simulation approaches from civil engineering can test AI systems under rare but catastrophic scenarios.

projects.title: AI-dependent infrastructure risk assessment
projects.description: Identify critical infrastructure systems increasingly reliant on AI and assess cascading failure risks.

projects.title: Resilience standards for AI in public systems
projects.description: Develop engineering standards for AI systems deployed in water, energy, and transportation infrastructure.

projects.title: Multi-fidelity testing for AI safety
projects.description: Adapt civil engineering simulation approaches to rapidly test AI systems under rare but severe failure conditions.
